poster.recruitment.headline:
500 Resumes. One Right Hire.
Your Team Already Missed Her.
poster.recruitment.body: Half those resumes were written by AI. They all look the same. Your HR team skims for hours and still lets the best candidate slip through. Flame Source OS scores every application in seconds. Only the people worth meeting reach your desk.
poster.finance.headline:
Three People. Forty Hours.
One Wrong Number Undoes It All.
poster.finance.body: Payroll. Reconciliation. Invoicing. Forty hours a month of copy-paste-check-repeat — and someone still keys in the wrong number. Flame Source OS runs the entire cycle. No manual entry. No late nights. No correction email the next morning.
poster.music.headline:
The Song Took One Night.
The Arrangement Killed Three Weeks.
poster.music.body: The melody is done. Then the grind starts — layering, mixing, waiting on collaborators. For Singapore artists, that gap kills momentum and income. Flame Source OS handles arrangement and instrumentation in days, not weeks. Your sound stays yours.
poster.restaurant.headline:
"Less Oil. Extra Crispy. No Chili."
Your Burmese Server Got
Every Word.
poster.restaurant.body: Dish names are easy. The real problem is "less salt", "crispier", "don't overcook it". AR smart glasses give your server real-time subtitles of exactly what the customer said — no awkward pauses, just a natural conversation. Off the floor, an AI tutor drills them on real requests until the glasses become a safety net, not a crutch.
poster.sales.headline:
First Week on the Floor.
She Closed Like a Ten-Year Vet.
poster.sales.body: New reps fail because nobody is beside them when it counts. Flame Source OS listens to every customer conversation live and coaches your rep on what to say next — like having your best closer in every room. Study-abroad consultancies. Hair salons. Any team that sells face-to-face.
hero.headline: AI That Actually Ships.
hero.sub: Your team burns 40% of its hours on work a machine should own.
hero.sub2: Flame Source OS fixes that — one workflow at a time.
gap.label: The Problem
gap.title:
Every Company Has AI.
Almost None Get Results.
gap.body1: You bought the tools. You hired the people. Six months later the chatbot handles four questions and your ops team still lives in spreadsheets. The models are powerful. The problem? Nobody wired them to your actual business.
gap.body2: The gap isn't intelligence. It's execution. You don't need another dashboard or another pilot programme. You need AI that touches the work — payroll, screening, ordering, translation — and moves a number your CFO can point to.
gap.stat: of enterprise AI projects never reach production
product.label: Flame Source OS
product.title:
Tell Us the Problem.
We Ship the Fix.
product.desc: An AI operating system that orchestrates models, tools, and workflows — so your team makes decisions, not configurations.
product.f1.title: Model Routing
product.f1.body: Picks the right AI model for each task automatically — balancing speed, accuracy, and cost. No prompt tuning. No vendor lock-in.
product.f2.title: Skill Library
product.f2.body: Pre-built, domain-specific skills for recruitment, finance, content, translation, and more. Each skill encodes expert logic — not just prompts.
product.f3.title: Zero Prompt Engineering
product.f3.body: Describe the outcome in plain language. The OS handles decomposition, tool selection, error recovery, and quality checks.
cap.label: Under the Hood
cap.title: What Powers Flame Source OS
cap.desc: Three layers that make the operating system work.
cap.c1.title: AI Orchestration
cap.c1.body: Multi-model routing, task decomposition, autonomous error recovery. The OS picks the right model, chains the right tools, and verifies every output before it ships.
cap.c2.title: Integration Engineering
cap.c2.body: Connectors to ERPs, CRMs, databases, and custom APIs. We wire AI into your existing stack — no rip-and-replace, no six-month migration.
cap.c3.title: Intelligent Hardware
cap.c3.body: When software alone isn't enough, we design IoT sensors and edge devices that feed real-world data straight into the AI pipeline. 34 patents. 150+ countries.

solutions.hero.label: Solutions
solutions.hero.title:
Workflow Automation
That Delivers Results
solutions.hero.desc: We automate the manual workflows your team shouldn't still be doing — hiring, payroll, frontline communication, sales enablement.
solutions.recruitment.title: Automated Screening, Scoring, Ranking
solutions.recruitment.problem: The problem: Your consultants start every morning buried in resumes instead of talking to candidates. With the rise of polished, template-driven applications, quick visual scanning is no longer reliable — strong candidates get buried while surface-level ones float to the top.
solutions.recruitment.workflow: We deploy an automated screening and ranking system that reads every incoming resume, scores candidates against your role-specific criteria, and surfaces a ranked shortlist each morning. The system handles formatting inconsistencies, parses real experience from filler, and flags candidates whose backgrounds genuinely match — regardless of how well the resume is written. Your consultants start the day with a shortlist, not a stack.
solutions.recruitment.delivery: Deployed in approximately one month. Most of that time is iterative alignment — understanding how your team evaluates candidates, which criteria matter for different role types, and calibrating the ranking to match your judgment. When you flag a misranked candidate, we adjust and redeploy within hours.
solutions.recruitment.fit: Recruitment consultancies and in-house hiring teams in Singapore processing high volumes of applications across multiple roles.
solutions.recruitment.outcome1: Screening time reduced from hours to minutes
solutions.recruitment.outcome2: Consultants spend more of their day in conversations, not reading documents
solutions.recruitment.outcome3: Adjustments deployed same-day when rankings need recalibrating
solutions.finance.title: Payroll, Reconciliation, Invoicing Automation
solutions.finance.problem: The problem: Your operations staff handle both tenancy management and finance workflows. Operational urgencies during the month push finance tasks to the back of the queue, leaving invoicing and reconciliation backlogged at month-end. Manual data entry across spreadsheets creates errors that compound downstream.
solutions.finance.workflow: We deliver two connected automation solutions. The first structures your operations workflow — tenant records, unit status tracking, lease timelines, and task scheduling — into a single managed system. The second automates the finance workflow — invoice generation from operational data, payment matching, and reconciliation reporting. Because both solutions share the same data, an updated lease automatically flows into the correct invoice schedule.
solutions.finance.delivery: Delivered within approximately one month. The iterative process surfaces edge cases — partial-month billing, multi-unit accounts, variable schedules — through back-and-forth testing. When you identify a scenario we have not accounted for, the fix is typically delivered within a day.
solutions.finance.fit: Property services companies, facilities management firms, and operations-heavy SMEs in Singapore where the same staff juggle both operational and financial workflows.
solutions.finance.outcome2: Manual data-entry errors eliminated — invoices match tenancy records automatically
solutions.finance.outcome3: Staff freed from end-of-month finance tasks to focus on tenant relationships
solutions.frontline.title: AR Smart Glasses + Voice AI for F&B Staff
solutions.frontline.problem: The problem: Your service staff learn dish names and basic flows quickly. The persistent problem is nuanced customer requests — "less oil", "crispier", "no chili" — the modifiers where dining preferences actually live. These get lost in translation, causing wrong orders, food waste, and frustration for staff who know they misunderstood but cannot pinpoint what was said.
solutions.frontline.workflow: We deploy AR smart glasses that provide real-time subtitles during customer interactions — including the specific modifiers — displayed in the staff member's field of view. The interaction stays natural; no need to ask customers to repeat themselves. Separately, we build a web-based training app that staff use during breaks to practise real customer phrases with spaced repetition. Over time, staff internalise the language and rely on the glasses less. Our Guangzhou team assists with hardware sourcing to keep costs manageable.
solutions.frontline.delivery: Deployed in approximately one month. The iterative process is especially important here because modifier vocabulary is domain-specific — "dry" means something different for noodles than for vegetables. We work closely with your kitchen and floor managers to build an accurate phrase library, updating translations same-day when staff flag anything unnatural.
solutions.frontline.fit: F&B operators in Singapore with multilingual frontline staff — especially restaurants where nuanced customer requests directly affect service quality.
solutions.frontline.outcome1: Wrong orders from modifier misunderstandings effectively eliminated
solutions.frontline.outcome2: Staff visibly more confident during service — customers no longer need to repeat or simplify requests
solutions.frontline.outcome3: Several staff members progressed to understanding most modifiers without checking the glasses
solutions.sales.title: Real-Time AI Coaching for Sales Teams
solutions.sales.problem: The problem: In customer-facing businesses, the quality of the conversation determines whether a sale closes. New staff know your products but lack the instinct for when to recommend, how to handle objections, and how to close naturally. Experienced staff perform well but have no scalable way to transfer what they know. Traditional training — shadowing, role-play, manuals — helps, but there is always a gap between training and live performance.
solutions.sales.workflow: We deploy a real-time coaching system that transcribes live customer conversations and provides staff with contextual prompts — suggested responses, product recommendations, and objection-handling cues — in real time. The coaching is subtle and non-intrusive. For new hires, we also build a practice partner: a conversational training tool that simulates realistic customer interactions and adapts to each person's weak spots, so they can rehearse before going on the floor.
solutions.sales.delivery: Each deployment takes approximately one month. The majority of time is spent understanding your sales process, common customer objections, and what "good" looks like in your specific context. A creative studio has very different dynamics from a hair salon, so the coaching logic is tailored for each business.
solutions.sales.fit: Customer-facing sales teams in Singapore — creative studios, consultancies, salons, and service businesses where the conversation is the product.
solutions.sales.outcome1: New staff productive on the floor significantly sooner — handling customer conversations with confidence from week one
solutions.sales.outcome2: Experienced staff report the system occasionally surfaces recommendations they had not considered
solutions.sales.outcome3: The practice partner gives nervous new hires a low-pressure environment to build skills before going live
solutions.creative.title: Music Arrangement Acceleration
solutions.creative.problem: The problem: Your creative ideas come together fast — melodies and song structures take shape quickly. But the arrangement and instrumentation phase is a bottleneck. Layering instruments, creating production-ready arrangements, and iterating on sonic direction takes weeks per track. For an artist building momentum, that delay means fewer releases, slower audience growth, and lost creative energy.
solutions.creative.workflow: We deploy tools that accelerate the arrangement and instrumentation workflow. The system takes your core musical ideas — melody, chord progression, song structure — and generates arrangement drafts with instrumentation options. You review, select, and refine from these drafts rather than building every layer from scratch. Creative decisions stay entirely with you; the repetitive production work moves dramatically faster. The output integrates with standard music production software.
solutions.creative.delivery: Delivered in approximately one month. The iterative process is essential because musical taste is subjective and personal. Through fast back-and-forth, we refine the system's understanding of your sonic preferences until the drafts consistently land close to your intended direction.
solutions.creative.fit: Independent musicians and emerging artists in Singapore whose creative output outpaces their production capacity.
solutions.creative.outcome1: Arrangement turnaround compressed from weeks to days per track
solutions.creative.outcome2: Creative momentum maintained — full versions heard while the idea is still fresh
solutions.creative.outcome3: Final output quality validated by the artist's award-winning mentors
caseStudies.hero.label: Case Studies
caseStudies.hero.title:
Real Results from
Real Operations
caseStudies.hero.desc: See how Singapore businesses transformed their workflows with Flame Source. Every project here was delivered in roughly one month through close, iterative collaboration.
caseStudies.card1.title: Automated Resume Screening for a Recruitment Consultancy
caseStudies.card1.excerpt: We deployed automated resume screening and ranking for a Singapore recruitment consultancy. Every incoming application is now scored and shortlisted without manual review, letting consultants focus on candidate conversations instead of document triage.
caseStudies.card2.title: Two Workflow Solutions for a Property Services Company
caseStudies.card2.excerpt: We delivered two solutions for the same Singapore property services client: rental operations automation to streamline tenant and unit management, and finance automation to handle invoicing and reconciliation. Manual data entry and end-of-month scrambles were replaced with structured workflows.
caseStudies.card3.title: AR Glasses and AI Training for Multilingual Restaurant Staff
caseStudies.card3.excerpt: We deployed AR smart glasses that give Burmese service staff real-time subtitles for nuanced customer requests — "less oil", "crispier", "no chili". An AI teacher app lets staff practise real phrases during breaks, turning the glasses from a dependency into a safety net.
caseStudies.card4.title: Real-Time AI Coaching for Customer-Facing Sales Teams
caseStudies.card4.excerpt: We built a real-time AI coaching system using speech-to-text during live customer conversations. Deployed across a creative services studio, a study-abroad consultancy, and hair salons. New staff also get an AI practice partner to rehearse conversations before going live.
caseStudies.card5.title: Arrangement and Instrumentation Acceleration for an Emerging Artist
caseStudies.card5.excerpt: We helped an emerging Singapore musician — mentored by award-winning local producers — accelerate the arrangement and instrumentation process. The creative direction stayed entirely with the artist; the repetitive production work moved dramatically faster.
howWeWork.hero.label: Process
howWeWork.hero.title:
Five Steps.
From First Call to Running System.
howWeWork.hero.desc: Most projects go live within a month. Every engagement follows the same process so you always know what comes next.
howWeWork.step1.label: Consult
howWeWork.step1.short: We sit down with your team to understand how work actually gets done, where it stalls, and what success looks like.
howWeWork.step2.label: Align & Sign
howWeWork.step2.short: We agree on exactly what gets delivered, the timeline, and scope. Then we sign a contract and get started.
howWeWork.step3.label: Build & Iterate
howWeWork.step3.short: We build fast, you review, we refine. Up to three revision rounds are included in every contract.
howWeWork.step4.label: Go Live
howWeWork.step4.short: Final delivery, integration into your systems, and hands-on training so your team can run it from day one.
howWeWork.step5.label: Maintain
howWeWork.step5.short: Ongoing monitoring, support, and optimisation. We stay involved so the system keeps working as your business evolves.
howWeWork.detail1.title: Consult: Learn How Your Team Works
howWeWork.detail1.body: Before we propose anything, we need to understand the day-to-day reality of your operations. We meet with the people who actually do the work — not just the decision-makers — to map out workflows, pain points, and the criteria that matter most to you.
howWeWork.detail1.item1: On-site or virtual walkthrough of current workflows
howWeWork.detail1.item2: Conversations with end-users, not just managers
howWeWork.detail1.item3: Identification of manual bottlenecks and repeated tasks
howWeWork.detail1.item4: Clarity on what "working well" looks like for your team
howWeWork.detail1.sidebarBody: A clear picture of the problem and a shared understanding of what the solution should accomplish. No jargon-heavy reports — just a straightforward summary you can share with your team.
howWeWork.detail2.title: Align & Sign: Lock In the Scope
howWeWork.detail2.body: This is where most of the back-and-forth happens — and that's by design. We work through exactly what gets delivered, when, and how it connects to your existing tools. Once everyone is on the same page, we sign a contract and kick off.
howWeWork.detail2.item4: Contract signed before any build work begins
howWeWork.detail2.sidebarBody: A signed agreement with a fixed scope, clear timeline, and no hidden costs. You know exactly what to expect before we write a single line of code.
howWeWork.detail3.title: Build & Iterate: Fast Delivery, Real Feedback
howWeWork.detail3.body: We deliver working versions quickly so you can try them in your real environment. Every contract includes up to three revision rounds, though most clients only need two. You review, we adjust, and the system gets better with each cycle.
howWeWork.detail3.item2: Up to 3 revision rounds included in every contract
howWeWork.detail3.item3: Feedback reviewed and incorporated within days
howWeWork.detail3.sidebarBody: A system that has been tested against your real workflows, not a demo environment. By the time we move to go-live, your team has already used it.
howWeWork.detail4.title: Go Live: Into Your Systems, Into Your Hands
howWeWork.detail4.body: The final version is deployed into your production environment. We handle the integration with your existing systems and run hands-on training sessions so your team can operate it independently.
howWeWork.detail4.item3: Documentation your team can actually use
howWeWork.detail4.item4: Handover checklist completed with your ops lead
howWeWork.detail4.sidebarBody: A live system running inside your operations, with a trained team ready to use it. No dependency on us to keep the lights on.
howWeWork.detail5.title: Maintain: We Stay Involved
howWeWork.detail5.body: After go-live, we don't disappear. We monitor performance, fix issues, and make adjustments as your operations change. Most clients stay on a lightweight maintenance plan so things keep running smoothly.
howWeWork.detail5.item1: Ongoing system monitoring and health checks
howWeWork.detail5.sidebarBody: Peace of mind that the system keeps working. If something breaks or your process changes, we handle it — usually within the same business day.
howWeWork.faq.label: FAQ
howWeWork.faq.title: Common Questions
howWeWork.faq.q1: How do we usually start working together?
howWeWork.faq.a1: It starts with a conversation. We meet your team — usually over a call or in person — to understand how your operations work today and where the biggest pain points are. There is no cost or commitment at this stage. If we see a fit, we move into the alignment phase where we define what gets built.
howWeWork.faq.q2: What systems do you need to connect to?
howWeWork.faq.a2: That depends entirely on your setup. We work with whatever your team already uses — spreadsheets, HR platforms, accounting tools, CRMs, messaging apps, or internal databases. We map integration requirements during the alignment phase so there are no surprises at deployment.
howWeWork.faq.q3: How long does a project take from start to go-live?
howWeWork.faq.a3: Most projects go live within about one month. The alignment stage — where we agree on scope and deliverables — is usually the most time-intensive part. Once we start building, the iteration cycles move fast.
howWeWork.faq.q4: How many rounds of revisions do we get?
howWeWork.faq.a4: Every contract includes up to three revision rounds. In practice, most clients are happy after two. We deliver a working version early so you can test it in your real environment and give us concrete feedback.
howWeWork.faq.a5: We do. After launch, we offer ongoing maintenance plans that cover monitoring, bug fixes, and adjustments as your workflows change. Your team is trained to use the system independently, but we stay available so you are never stuck.
howWeWork.faq.q6: How do you handle our data?
howWeWork.faq.a6: Your data stays yours. We only access what is needed to build and run the solution, and access permissions are defined in the contract. We do not share client data with third parties, and we follow Singapore's PDPA requirements. If you have specific data-handling policies, we work within them.
howWeWork.faq.q7: What kind of teams is this a good fit for?
howWeWork.faq.a7: We work best with operations-heavy teams at Singapore SMEs — typically 20 to 200 staff. If your team spends significant time on manual, repetitive tasks like screening candidates, processing payroll, reconciling invoices, or coordinating across messaging apps, there is likely a strong fit. The decision-maker is usually an ops director, business owner, or CFO.
howWeWork.cta.label: Ready?
howWeWork.cta.title: Book an Intro
howWeWork.cta.desc: Tell us about the workflow that's costing you the most time. We'll show you what automation looks like for your team.
company.hero.label: Company
company.hero.title:
Singapore Office.
Guangzhou Engineering.
Real Systems Delivered.
company.hero.desc: Flame Source Technology is a Singapore-registered company that designs and deploys workflow automation for operations teams. We combine local project delivery with a deep engineering bench in Guangzhou.
company.about.label: About Us
company.about.title: Who We Are
company.about.p1: Flame Source Technology Pte. Ltd. (UEN 202432774E) was incorporated in Singapore in 2024. Our office is at 39 Hongkong Street, in the heart of the CBD. We are a solutions delivery company — we don't sell software subscriptions, we design and deploy automation systems that solve specific operational problems for our clients.
company.about.p2: Our team spans Singapore and Guangzhou. Singapore handles client relationships, project management, and go-to-market. Our Guangzhou office brings deep engineering capacity — software development, hardware prototyping, and supply chain access for components like AR smart glasses and IoT sensors. This dual presence lets us move quickly from concept to working system.
company.about.p3: We work with operations-heavy SMEs across F&B, recruitment, financial services, and education. The problems we solve are unglamorous but expensive — manual screening, payroll reconciliation, multilingual staff communication, sales follow-up. If your team is still doing it by hand, we can probably automate it.
company.team.label: Team
company.team.title: Leadership
company.tech.label: Technology
company.tech.title: How We Build
company.tech.p1: Every automation we deliver runs on Flame Source OS — our internal platform that ties together AI models, integration connectors, and workflow logic. It is not a product we sell. It is the reason we can deploy reliable systems quickly.
company.tech.p2: Because every client project shares the same underlying platform, improvements compound. A connector built for one client's ERP becomes available for the next. A model fine-tuned on recruitment data can be adapted for sales scoring.
company.tech.f1: Model scheduling — routes each task to the right AI model based on cost, latency, and accuracy requirements
company.tech.f2: Skill library — reusable, domain-specific modules (resume parsing, invoice extraction, multilingual TTS)
company.tech.f3: Integration engine — pre-built connectors for common ERPs, CRMs, HRIS, and accounting systems used in Singapore
company.tech.f4: Hardware bridge — firmware and protocol layer for AR glasses, IoT sensors, and edge devices from our Guangzhou supply chain
company.tech.sidebar1: Most automation companies are software-only. Our Guangzhou team gives us direct access to hardware prototyping, PCB fabrication, and component sourcing — backed by 34 patents in sensing and wireless technology from our co-founder's work at GameSir.
company.tech.sidebar2: This matters when the solution requires something physical: AR smart glasses for frontline workers, custom IoT sensors for facility monitoring, or ruggedised edge devices for factory floors. We handle the full stack, not just the software layer.
